business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

positives: Formal return-to-work or modified duty program in place
Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits
Hold-harmless agreements obtained from all subcontractors
Five listed locations; four are sprinklered
Experienced management team with 28 years under current management
concerns: Certificates of insurance are not required from all subcontractors before work begins
Written contracts are not used with all subcontractors
Hazardous materials are used or encountered in operations
40% of work is performed by subcontractors
One listed warehouse location is not sprinklered
Prior insurance history shows a cancellation in 2022
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history on page 2 shows claims counts of 13 in 2024 with Nationwide Insurance, 10 in 2023 with Berkshire Hathaway Guard, and 4 in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group. The 2022 policy shows a cancellation.
